ksa_text: Knowledge of responsible AI principles, their operationalization, and audit methods, including fairness metrics and metric selection, explainability methods and documentation standards, human oversight requirements and protocols, AI impact assessment methodologies, and bias test design.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to Data Compliance Analyst scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("bias test", "fairness.{0,10} ?:assess|metric|test|audit", "responsible ai"). STRM composite is strong (0.5553); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 4 job-posting-level and 0 certification-level matches (CRISC, CISM, FRM, NIST AI RMF, SR 11-7, IAPP). Competency appears regularly in RSK role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
